<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<resources>
    <!-- Application name -->
    <string name="app_name">Inventory</string>

    <!-- Common actions -->
    <string name="action_settings">Settings</string>
    <string name="action_search">Search</string>
    <string name="action_add">Add</string>
    <string name="action_edit">Edit</string>
    <string name="action_delete">Delete</string>
    <string name="action_save">Save</string>
    <string name="action_cancel">Cancel</string>
    <string name="action_ok">OK</string>

    <!-- Common messages -->
    <string name="loading">Loading…</string>
    <string name="error_generic">An error occurred. Please try again.</string>
    <string name="error_network">Network connection error. Please check your internet connection.</string>
    <string name="success_saved">Saved successfully</string>
    <string name="success_deleted">Deleted successfully</string>
</resources>

task_intent.title: 001-initialize-project-scaffolding-with-standard-andro
task_intent.description: Scaffold a standard Android project structure with Gradle build files, an Application class, a main Activity, and a manifest. This establishes the foundational code patterns that all future features will build upon.
